user_story: US-05 — Como administrador, eu quero filtrar os check-ins de todos os usuários por status no painel admin para que eu possa focar nas pendências ou auditar aprovações e rejeições de forma eficiente.
requirements: RF-004: useCheckIns recebe status da URL (sem hardcode de 'pending')
RF-005: "Todos" exibe todos os check-ins (status: undefined)

tests.name: renders the filter bar with all 4 pills
calls useCheckIns with status from URL params
tests.details: Verifies useCheckIns receives status from URL: 'status=pending&page=2' → { status: 'pending', page: 2 }

tests.name: calls useCheckIns without status when no filter is active (Todos)
tests.details: Verifies useCheckIns called with status: undefined when no filter active

tests.name: shows default empty state when no filter is active and list is empty
shows contextual empty state when filter is active and list is empty
tests.details: Shows status-specific message: 'Nenhum check-in pendente encontrado'

tests.name: shows contextual empty state for rejected filter
tests.details: Shows status-specific message: 'Nenhum check-in rejeitado encontrado'

hardcoded_pending_check.details: Status parameter comes from useCheckInFilters() hook via URL params, not hardcoded in implementation

status_flow.behavior: When URL has status=pending, passes 'pending'. When no status in URL, passes undefined for 'Todos' filter

filter_bar_integration.behavior: Receives status from hook and calls setStatus on pill click

code_review.page_tsx_line_111: useCheckIns({ page, status }) - status is a variable, not hardcoded
code_review.page_tsx_line_110: const { status, page, setStatus, setPage } = useCheckInFilters() - hook manages state
code_review.page_tsx_line_134: CheckInFilterBar status={status} onStatusChange={setStatus} - filter bar integrated

summary: US-05 fully verified. All 4 filter pills render (RF-001). useCheckIns receives status from URL params without hardcoding (RF-004). 'Todos' filter sends status: undefined (RF-005). 6/6 tests passing.
